rationale: TASK-090 is ready to close. Portable alignment drift fixture matrix covers vertical drift, horizontal drift, stale generated output, missing accepted build coverage, missing audit evidence, invalid publication proof, and clean fixture path. CodeWiki dogfood-only source confusion was excluded by accepted scope correction. Fixture runner is included in test:smoke, npm test passes, generated parity passes, and content is committed with immutable proof.
